description: 目標語系課程工廠：以目標語內容為核心生成完整單元，並補齊中英文教學層與前端轉換

tasks.desc: Freeze unit_blueprint_v1 contract fields: target_lang, support_langs, skill_targets, teaching_notes, and adapter-facing metadata.
Define target-language-first A1/A2 unit skeleton sequence (input/check/structure/output/review/followups) and required node constraints.
Define mastery rubrics and completion thresholds for output modes (chunk_assembly/frame_fill/response_builder/pattern_transform/guided/review_retrieval), including repair sub-mode.
Build target language pattern library for survival curriculum (can_do, slots, constraints, common errors, repair mappings).
Define the first pilot generator input pack for dialogue/travel/daily-life units, including unit_intent and scenario constraints, without coupling B1+ segmentation repair work.
Implement the pilot generator path that emits unit_blueprint_v1 from skeleton + pattern library + unit_intent for dialogue/travel/daily-life units.
Implement language-specific validation gates for target language constraints (honorific/register, morphology, syntax, classifier/counter rules as applicable).
Implement bilingual teaching layer pipeline (target -> zh_tw/en) for all learner-facing strings and instructional notes.
Add bilingual QA gate checks: missing zh_tw/en, terminology inconsistency, TODO leakage, and non-localized learner strings.
Create translation memory and teaching glossary for stable zh_tw/en wording across units and levels.
Implement pilot blueprint-to-viewer adaptation so generated unit_blueprint_v1 files can be verified in modular viewer without changing the mainline artifact contract.
Document the verification boundary: modular viewer fixtures are for pilot validation only and must not replace the source-build artifact contract.
Define batch production runbook for target-language units (scaffold -> author -> translate -> validate -> PM trial -> freeze).
Run pilot freeze on 3 units (e.g., A1-U04/U05/U06) with full target-lang content, zh_tw/en teaching coverage, viewer verification, and regression report.
Define functional outcome index contract (can_do -> lesson_refs) for learner goal-based navigation and generator filtering.
Define context/scenario index contract (scene tags -> lesson_refs) for travel/use-case based lesson discovery.
Define grammar topic index contract (grammar_point -> lesson_refs with core/support/review role) for grammar-driven learning paths.
Define pattern index contract (pattern_id/frame alias -> lesson_refs) and cross-link with function/grammar/context indices.
Define dual-track course map contract (functional lessons + grammar lessons) with cross-track bridge rules and sequencing policy.
Define Grammar Book Track contract (dialogue-first grammar lessons) and cross-link legacy grammar progression to survival lessons.
